rankings.title: IRP1 [4Fe-4S] Cluster Occupancy as Mechanistic Driver of Diurnal IRE-mRNA Control
rankings.key_strength: Highest groundedness and testability; native gel assay immediately actionable
rankings.key_weakness: Nadimpalli 2024 feeding attribution; IRP2 dominance (10-fold vs 2-fold)

rankings.title: Frataxin Iron Donation as Circadian Fe-S Rheostat via Hepcidin LIP
rankings.key_strength: Balanced scores; all literature verified; Lill 2025 stoichiometry genuinely new
rankings.key_weakness: Ferritin buffering dampens LIP oscillation; mitoferrin rate-limiting; FA carrier effect size

rankings.title: CISD2/NAF-1 as Circadian ER-Mito Calcium Timer via [2Fe-2S] Lability
rankings.key_strength: Zero-publication novelty confirmed; triple convergence (redox, pH, Ca2+); unique MAM position
rankings.key_weakness: Cluster half-life estimated not measured; NADH feedback loop 3-4 untested steps; CISD2 KO aging confound

rankings.title: Peroxiredoxin Cycle as Non-Transcriptional Fe-S Clock via H2O2
rankings.key_strength: Evolutionary logic compelling; BMAL1 KO test genuinely novel; transformative if resolved
rankings.key_weakness: Matrix H2O2 ~0.15uM below Fe-S destruction threshold >1uM; Prx3 resistant to hyperoxidation

diversity_detail.H4: post-transcriptional RNA regulation (IRP1 apo/holo → IRE binding)

matchups.reason: Groundedness (8 vs 6) and testability (9 vs 7) decisive
Testability advantage (9 vs 7) and groundedness edge (8 vs 7)
H3 quantitative H2O2 gap near-fatal; groundedness 8 vs 5
Better groundedness, verified literature, no multi-step untested loop
Zero-publication novelty and triple convergence beat quantitative gap
Verified literature and distinct mechanism beat threshold problem

advancement.rationale: All 4 hypotheses advance to Cycle 2. H3 at risk — needs quantitative rescue mechanism for H2O2 gap.
